content.text: I can set this up two ways. Option A: dev-only mode — single container, fastest path. Option B: standard mode — dev + stage pair, costs more. Should I go with the dev-only setup, or would you prefer a stage slot too.

result: I can set this up two ways. Option A: dev-only mode — single container, fastest path. Option B: standard mode — dev + stage pair, costs more. Should I go with the dev-only setup, or would you prefer a stage slot too.
